notes: Unified Settings modal opened from the nav gear button
Sidebar tabs: Work schedule, Tracking, Focus, Data
Configurable workday: target hours/day, weekly target, workdays, first day of week, time format
Auto-round, lunch break and Pomodoro settings centralized in the modal
Save / Cancel flow: changes are buffered and only applied on Save
Data tab: export, import and reset — applied live without reloading the page
Reminder keeps running in the background via a dedicated service
